root_cause: Recent container runtime upgrade or restart introduced a CRI compatibility regression on the node
evidence: Node Ready condition currently reports a container runtime API/version mismatch
Recent node startup or re-registration signal observed on node1 (reason=RegisteredNode)
CRI mismatch failures began 1.7 minutes after that startup window
Mismatch failures repeated 9 time(s) within 4.3 minutes
First post-start mismatch event reason: FailedCreatePodSandBox

causes.message: Timeline shows a recent kubelet or node startup/re-registration signal before CRI incompatibility began
A recent runtime or kubelet rollout introduced a CRI compatibility regression on the node
Kubelet can reach the runtime but repeated CRI API/version negotiation fails after the rollout window
The pod remains blocked because sandbox creation and runtime operations fail after the upgrade regression

node:node1: Node emitted a recent startup or re-registration signal before mismatch failures began
pod:post-upgrade-api-pod: Pod is assigned to a node where CRI mismatch failures started immediately after a restart or upgrade window
Failed to create pod sandbox: rpc error: code = Unimplemented desc = unknown service runtime.v1.RuntimeService

likely_causes: containerd or CRI-O was upgraded to a CRI API level kubelet on this node does not support
Kubelet was upgraded or restarted against an older runtime that does not implement the expected CRI service
A node maintenance or package rollout restarted kubelet/runtime components in an incompatible combination
The runtime shim or CRI plugin changed during the rollout and now fails kubelet API negotiation
suggested_checks: Compare kubelet and container runtime versions on the node and recent upgrade history
Inspect kubelet and container runtime logs around the startup window and first CRI mismatch failures
